tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Cranking grass edges: position boat just outside grass line, make parallel/quartering casts along it. Use 14-20lb fluorocarbon for strength to rip free. When bait loads up slightly, pause — that tug might be a fish. If not, drop rod tip for slack, sharp snap to free it, continue retrieving. 3XD/Series 5/5XD covers 8-15ft grass edges.'
